title: Gmail RETVec AI spam filter: 38% better spam detection 19.4% fewer false positives. Domain reputation > IP reputation.
description: Gmail deployed RETVec (Resilient Efficient Text Vectorizer) AI system. 38% improved spam detection 19.4% reduced false positives. Algorithm mimics human reading: recognizes F_R_E_E = FREE. No more typo/emoji spam tricks. Domain reputation now more important than IP. ESPs weight engagement quality: time reading reply depth conversation length. 98.16% delivery but only 83.1% inbox placement. Safe limit: 35-50 emails per inbox per day.
actionable_steps: 1. Eliminate typo tricks emojis keyword stuffing 2. Personalize for engagement not spam evasion 3. Focus on domain reputation warming (2-4 weeks) 4. Track inbox placement rate not delivery rate 5. Monitor engagement metrics: read time reply depth 6. 35-50 emails/inbox/day maximum 7. Use 50/50 GSuite/Outlook split
reviewer_notes: added_by: high_signal_scan_batch1. CRITICAL OUTBOUND update. RETVec makes all spam tricks obsolete. engagement_authenticity: AUTHENTIC (industry benchmark data). Cross-ref ALPHA422 ALPHA429 ALPHA436.

title: 2026 cold email: 87.2% Gmail inbox placement leads. Outlook worst at 75.6%. AI-driven filters make lazy setups pipeline killers.

title: Content repurposing 2026: operational requirement. Modular content for AI extraction. Short-form video + multi-platform mandatory.
description: 2026 SEO shift: content repurposing from nice-to-have to operational requirement. Modular content strategy: design in self-contained chunks AI can extract independently (LLM might need 1 paragraph from 3K-word guide). Re-frame core ideas for different contexts formats attention levels. Search engines reward topical authority over isolated hits. Short-form video + forum participation capture shifting attention. Repurposed content supports clusters: single research-backed article anchors several supporting pieces reinforcing same entity.
actionable_steps: 1. Design all content as modular chunks (each paragraph standalone) 2. Single source content → multiple formats (article → video → newsletter → social) 3. Build content clusters around core topics 4. Add short-form video repurposing to workflow 5. Participate in forums (Reddit) with content 6. Entity-based SEO not keyword-based
reviewer_notes: added_by: high_signal_scan_batch1. SEO paradigm shift. Modular content = AI-friendly extraction. Content clusters = topical authority. Cross-ref ALPHA471 ALPHA473.

title: SaaS 2026: AI agents manage workflows. Vertical SaaS 2-3x growth vs horizontal. 80%+ consumption pricing. Retention > growth-at-all-costs.
